questionText: Você quer saber se seu colega pode ajudar você em um projeto urgente. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you give me a hand with this urgent project?
options: Could you give me a hand with this urgent project?
You must help me now
I need the best worker here
Do you like to work together?

questionText: Seu chefe pediu uma sugestão para melhorar a produtividade. Como você apresenta sua ideia?
correctAnswer: I think we could improve productivity by organizing our tasks better.
options: I think we could improve productivity by organizing our tasks better.
Our productivity is very bad
Everyone is lazy here
We need new workers

questionText: Você precisa informar seu gerente que não conseguirá cumprir um prazo. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I'm afraid I won't be able to meet the deadline this week.
options: I'm afraid I won't be able to meet the deadline this week.
The deadline is stupid
I can't work here anymore
Everyone knows the deadline is impossible

questionText: Um colega fez um bom trabalho e você quer elogiá-lo. Como você faz isso?
correctAnswer: Great job on the presentation! You did an excellent job.
options: Great job on the presentation! You did an excellent job.
You were okay today
That was not bad for you
I've seen better presentations

questionText: Você está em uma reunião e não entendeu um ponto. Como você expressa isso educadamente?
correctAnswer: Sorry, could you explain that point again? I didn't quite understand it.
options: Sorry, could you explain that point again? I didn't quite understand it.
That makes no sense
Speak clearly!
I don't get anything you say

questionText: Você quer propor uma mudança no processo de trabalho. Como você começa?
correctAnswer: I have an idea that might help us work more efficiently.
options: I have an idea that might help us work more efficiently.
Your process is wrong
We must change everything now
I know better than you

questionText: Um cliente está insatisfeito com um serviço. Como você responde profissionalmente?
correctAnswer: I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me help you resolve this issue.
options: I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me help you resolve this issue.
It's not my problem
You're always complaining
There's nothing I can do

questionText: Você precisa delegar uma tarefa a um subordinado. Como você faz isso claramente?
correctAnswer: Could you take care of this task for me? It needs to be done by Friday.
options: Could you take care of this task for me? It needs to be done by Friday.
You have to do this now!
Do whatever you want with this
This is your job forever

questionText: Um colega chegou atrasado novamente. Como você aborda isso de forma construtiva?
correctAnswer: I've noticed you've been arriving late recently. Is everything okay?
options: I've noticed you've been arriving late recently. Is everything okay?
You're always late, you're terrible
Stop being lazy
I'll tell the boss about this

questionText: Você está em uma entrevista de emprego. O entrevistador pergunta sobre seus pontos fracos. Como você responde?
correctAnswer: I sometimes struggle with public speaking, but I've been taking courses to improve.
options: I sometimes struggle with public speaking, but I've been taking courses to improve.
I have many weaknesses
I'm perfect, I have no weaknesses
Why are you asking me this?

questionText: Você precisa relatar um problema sério ao seu gerente. Como você começa?
correctAnswer: I need to discuss an important matter with you. Do you have a few minutes?
options: I need to discuss an important matter with you. Do you have a few minutes?
You have a big problem now
Everything is broken
I'm quitting this job

questionText: Um colega discorda com sua opinião em uma reunião. Como você responde respeitosamente?
correctAnswer: I understand your point, but I see it differently. Let me explain my perspective.
options: I understand your point, but I see it differently. Let me explain my perspective.
You're completely wrong
Nobody agrees with you anyway
You don't know what you're talking about

questionText: Você quer agradecer a alguém por uma oportunidade de desenvolvimento profissional. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Thank you very much for this amazing opportunity. I really appreciate it.
options: Thank you very much for this amazing opportunity. I really appreciate it.
This is what I deserved anyway
You had to give it to me
I don't really care about this

questionText: Você precisa pedir um aumento. Como você inicia essa conversa?
correctAnswer: I'd like to discuss my salary. I feel I've contributed significantly to the team.
options: I'd like to discuss my salary. I feel I've contributed significantly to the team.
Give me more money now
Everyone earns more than me
I deserve to be rich

questionText: Um cliente em potencial te liga e você quer agendar uma reunião. Como você procede?
correctAnswer: I'd be happy to set up a meeting with you. When would be convenient for you?
options: I'd be happy to set up a meeting with you. When would be convenient for you?
You should come here tomorrow
I'm very busy, try again later
Meetings are a waste of time

questionText: Você está se despedindo de um colega que está se mudando para outro trabalho. Como você expressa seus sentimentos?
correctAnswer: I'll miss working with you. Best of luck in your new position!
options: I'll miss working with you. Best of luck in your new position!
Good, I'm glad you're leaving
Nobody will remember you anyway
Your new job is probably worse

questionText: Seu colega cometeu um erro que afeta seu trabalho. Como você aborda isso diplomaticamente?
correctAnswer: I noticed there might be an issue with the report. Could we review it together?
options: I noticed there might be an issue with the report. Could we review it together?
You ruined everything with your mistake
You're incompetent
I'm going to report you

questionText: Você está em uma videoconferência e sua conexão está fraca. Como você comunica isso apropriadamente?
correctAnswer: I'm sorry, the connection seems unstable on my end. Could I call you back in a few minutes?
options: I'm sorry, the connection seems unstable on my end. Could I call you back in a few minutes?
My internet is broken, sorry
I can't hear you, you're bad
This technology is awful

questionText: Um colega pediu feedback sobre seu desempenho. Como você oferece crítica construtiva?
correctAnswer: You're doing well overall. I think you could improve your communication with the team.
options: You're doing well overall. I think you could improve your communication with the team.
You're not very good
Everyone does better than you
There's nothing good about your work

questionText: Você precisa pedir a um colega que você não conhece bem para colaborar em um projeto. Como você convida essa pessoa?
correctAnswer: Hi, I've heard great things about your work. Would you be interested in collaborating on this project?
options: Hi, I've heard great things about your work. Would you be interested in collaborating on this project?
You have to help me
I need someone to work for me
Can you do what I want?

questionText: Em uma apresentação, você cometeu um erro. Como você lida com isso profissionalmente?
correctAnswer: Let me correct that point. Actually, the correct figure is 500, not 50.
options: Let me correct that point. Actually, the correct figure is 500, not 50.
I made a mistake, I'm stupid
Forget what I just said
The numbers don't matter anyway

questionText: Você quer se oferecer para treinar um novo funcionário. Como você expressa isso para seu gerente?
correctAnswer: I'd be happy to mentor the new team member if you think that would be helpful.
options: I'd be happy to mentor the new team member if you think that would be helpful.
You should let me train the new guy
The new person needs help from someone good
I'm the best person to do this

questionText: Um cliente é exigente e seu colega está começando a se irritar. Como você intervém diplomaticamente?
correctAnswer: Let me take over here. We appreciate your detailed feedback and will address each point.
options: Let me take over here. We appreciate your detailed feedback and will address each point.
This customer is impossible
Stop complaining about everything
You're too demanding

questionText: Você precisa informar sobre o status de um projeto atrasado. Como você comunica isso a stakeholders?
correctAnswer: We've encountered some unexpected challenges, but we're implementing solutions to get back on track.
options: We've encountered some unexpected challenges, but we're implementing solutions to get back on track.
The project is a disaster
Nobody knows what they're doing
We'll never finish on time

questionText: Um superior te interrompe durante uma tarefa importante. Como você responde educadamente?
correctAnswer: Of course! What can I help you with? I can continue this later.
options: Of course! What can I help you with? I can continue this later.
I'm too busy right now, talk to someone else
You're interrupting me

questionText: Você quer propor uma solução inovadora que vai exigir mudanças significativas. Como você apresenta isso?
correctAnswer: I've been thinking about a new approach that could increase our efficiency significantly. Would you be open to discussing it?
options: I've been thinking about a new approach that could increase our efficiency significantly. Would you be open to discussing it?
Your way is wrong, we need my way
Change everything now
Trust me, I know better

questionText: Você precisa recusar uma tarefa extra porque já está sobrecarregado. Como você faz isso respeitosamente?
correctAnswer: I appreciate the opportunity, but I'm already at capacity. Could we discuss timeline options?
options: I appreciate the opportunity, but I'm already at capacity. Could we discuss timeline options?
I can't do it, end of story
You're asking too much of me
I'm not doing anything else

questionText: Um colega questionou sua competência em uma reunião. Como você responde assertivamente sem ser agressivo?
correctAnswer: I understand your concern. I'd be happy to walk you through my analysis and reasoning.
options: I understand your concern. I'd be happy to walk you through my analysis and reasoning.
That's a stupid question
You're just jealous of me
I don't have to explain myself

questionText: Você quer saber informações sobre benefícios da empresa. Como você pergunta a um representante de RH?
correctAnswer: Could you explain what health insurance options are available to employees?
options: Could you explain what health insurance options are available to employees?
Tell me all about your benefits right now
I want the best benefits
Your benefits are probably bad anyway

questionText: Você está participando de um networking event e quer iniciar uma conversa com um profissional. Como você começa?
correctAnswer: Hi, I'm impressed by your background in marketing. How did you get into this field?
options: Hi, I'm impressed by your background in marketing. How did you get into this field?
You must be important
I want your job
Marketing is so easy

questionText: Você precisa comunicar a um cliente que há um atraso na entrega do projeto. Como você faz isso minimizando o dano?
correctAnswer: We're slightly behind schedule due to unforeseen circumstances, but we're committed to delivering quality results soon.
options: We're slightly behind schedule due to unforeseen circumstances, but we're committed to delivering quality results soon.
Your project is late, sorry
There's nothing we can do
You'll have to wait much longer

questionText: Um colega acusou você de não ter feito seu trabalho corretamente. Como você responde mantendo a profissionalismo?
correctAnswer: I appreciate you bringing this to my attention. Let's review the work together and address any concerns.
options: I appreciate you bringing this to my attention. Let's review the work together and address any concerns.
That's not true, you're wrong
Why are you attacking me?
I did everything right, you just don't understand

questionText: Você precisa negociar um aumento de orçamento com seu gerente. Como você justifica isso?
correctAnswer: Given the expanded scope of our projects, I believe we need additional resources to maintain our quality standards.
options: Given the expanded scope of our projects, I believe we need additional resources to maintain our quality standards.
Give me more money now
Everyone else has more budget than us
I'm quitting if I don't get more money

questionText: Um cliente importante expressou insatisfação com um serviço. Como você demonstra empatia enquanto oferece soluções?
correctAnswer: I completely understand your frustration. Let me work on a solution that meets your expectations.
options: I completely understand your frustration. Let me work on a solution that meets your expectations.
Lots of customers complain
That's the best we can do

questionText: Você está em uma entrevista para um cargo de liderança. Como você responde quando perguntado sobre seu estilo de gerenciamento?
correctAnswer: I believe in empowering my team while providing clear guidance and regular feedback for growth.
options: I believe in empowering my team while providing clear guidance and regular feedback for growth.
I'm very strict and people fear me
I let people do whatever they want

questionText: Você precisa informar a equipe sobre um corte orçamentário que afetará os recursos. Como você comunica isso sensatamente?
correctAnswer: We need to adjust our budget this quarter. Let's focus on priorities and find creative ways to maintain productivity.
options: We need to adjust our budget this quarter. Let's focus on priorities and find creative ways to maintain productivity.
We're cutting the budget and everyone will suffer
The company doesn't care about us
Nothing will work anymore

questionText: Um colega de longa data foi promovido para um cargo que você também esperava. Como você felicita sinceramente?
correctAnswer: Congratulations on your promotion! You've earned it through your hard work and dedication.
options: Congratulations on your promotion! You've earned it through your hard work and dedication.
I can't believe they chose you over me
That position should have been mine

questionText: Você precisa solicitar feedback sobre seu desempenho de um colega que é crítico. Como você coloca a pessoa à vontade?
correctAnswer: I really value your perspective. Could you share some feedback on areas where I could improve?
options: I really value your perspective. Could you share some feedback on areas where I could improve?
Tell me what's wrong with me
You probably have complaints
I want to know all my flaws

questionText: Você está apresentando uma proposta de mudança organizacional. Como você antecipa e abordam resistências?
correctAnswer: I understand some might have concerns about this change. Let's discuss the benefits and address any worries together.
options: I understand some might have concerns about this change. Let's discuss the benefits and address any worries together.
This change is necessary, you have to accept it
Everyone complains too much
If you don't like it, leave

questionText: Um subordinado expressou desejo de deixar a empresa. Como você responde como gerente?
correctAnswer: I understand your decision. I'd appreciate if you could help with a smooth transition and let me know if I can support your next steps.
options: I understand your decision. I'd appreciate if you could help with a smooth transition and let me know if I can support your next steps.

Nobody leaves this job
Good riddance

questionText: Você está mediando um conflito entre dois membros da equipe. Como você inicia uma conversa construtiva?
correctAnswer: I'd like us to discuss this situation and find a resolution that works for everyone. Let's listen to each other.
options: I'd like us to discuss this situation and find a resolution that works for everyone. Let's listen to each other.
Both of you are wrong
Stop arguing immediately
I don't want to hear about your problems

questionText: Você precisa solicitar uma extensão de prazo para um projeto sem parecer incapaz. Como você faz essa solicitação?
correctAnswer: I want to ensure quality results. Could we discuss extending the deadline slightly to deliver the best outcome?
options: I want to ensure quality results. Could we discuss extending the deadline slightly to deliver the best outcome?
I need more time, I can't finish on time
Your deadline is unrealistic
I'm overworked and can't do this

questionText: Um executivo sênior pediu sua opinião sobre uma decisão estratégica. Como você oferece insight valioso sem ser presunçoso?
correctAnswer: From my perspective, we should also consider the impact on customer satisfaction alongside cost efficiency.
options: From my perspective, we should also consider the impact on customer satisfaction alongside cost efficiency.
Your ideia é errada
I know a better way to do this
You should listen to me

questionText: Você cometeu um erro que pode afetar um grande cliente. Como você comunica isso proativamente ao seu gerente?
correctAnswer: I need to inform you of an issue I discovered. I've already begun correcting it and have a plan to prevent it in the future.
options: I need to inform you of an issue I discovered. I've already begun correcting it and have a plan to prevent it in the future.
I made a big mistake

I don't know how to fix this

questionText: Um colega questionou a sua experiência para um projeto. Como você justifica sua capacidade sem ser defensivo?
correctAnswer: While this is a new area for me, I have strong analytical skills and I'm committed to learning quickly.
options: While this is a new area for me, I have strong analytical skills and I'm committed to learning quickly.
